notes: Verified via WebSearch + WebFetch 2026-07-19: official MDLBEAST page (mdlbeast.com/events/soundstorm-26) confirms 2026 edition runs Dec 3-4 at Banban, north Riyadh.

Historical pattern: 2024 edition Dec 12-14 (450k+ attendees, per Time Out Riyadh); 2025 edition Dec 11-13 (200+ artists, per Saudi Moments). No stable day-of-month, so core.type='estimated' with {{year}}-12-03 as best estimate.
Festival launched 2019 as part of Riyadh Season before becoming a standalone branded event with its own ticketing/dates.
Deliberately did NOT cite specific artist lineups (Post Malone, Eminem, etc.) or ticket prices (SAR 269-1799) since both change yearly and would go stale.
Content is purely entertainment/cultural/civic — zero religious content.

relatedSlugs limited to genuinely built events (riyadh-season, saudi-cup, diriyah-season, king-abdulaziz-camel-festival-saudi) — did not reference world-cup-2034-saudi since that event doesn't exist yet.
